allow: Bash(printf '%s\\n' '# Multi-Model Provider Management System - Implementation Plan' '' '## Overview' '' 'Transform the existing YAML-only model routing system into a fully DB-driven, runtime-configurable multi-model provider management system with admin UI, dynamic ChatModel creation, and enhanced health monitoring.' '' --- '' '## Phase 1: Database Schema and Entity Layer' '' '### 1.1 New Table: t_model_routing_candidate' '' 'The table stores all model routing candidates with per-candidate base URL and API key support.' '' Fields: '- id \(BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PK\)' '- name \(VARCHAR 128, UNIQUE with deleted\) - business name like deepseek-chat' '- display_name \(VARCHAR 128\) - UI display name' '- provider \(VARCHAR 64, default openai\) - provider identifier' '- model \(VARCHAR 128\) - model version like deepseek-chat, gpt-4o' '- base_url \(VARCHAR 512, nullable\) - custom API base URL' '- api_key \(VARCHAR 512, nullable\) - encrypted per-candidate API key' '- bean_name \(VARCHAR 128, nullable\) - Spring bean name, empty means dynamic creation' '- priority \(INT, default 100\) - lower is higher priority' '- enabled \(TINYINT 1, default 1\)' '- supports_thinking \(TINYINT 1, default 0\)' '- is_primary \(TINYINT 1, default 0\) - controls active health monitoring' '- temperature \(DOUBLE, nullable\)' '- max_tokens \(INT, nullable\)' '- timeout_ms \(BIGINT, nullable\)' '- remark \(VARCHAR 500\)' '- deleted \(TINYINT 1, default 0\) - logical delete' '- created_at, updated_at \(DATETIME\)' '' 'Indexes: uk_candidate_name\(name, deleted\), idx_enabled_priority\(enabled, priority\)' '' 'Design decisions:' '- base_url + api_key per candidate enables API relay style \(different providers with different endpoints\)' '- bean_name kept for backwards compatibility; when empty, system creates ChatModel dynamically' '- is_primary flag controls active vs passive monitoring \(cost-conscious\)' '- api_key stored with AES encryption \(key from application-private.yml\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '### 1.2 Entity: ModelRoutingCandidateDO' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/entity/ModelRoutingCandidateDO.java' '' 'Standard @Data @TableName\(t_model_routing_candidate\) entity following AgentConfigDO pattern.' 'Uses @TableId\(type = IdType.AUTO\) and @TableLogic on deleted field.' 'All fields map to the table columns defined above.' '' '### 1.3 Mapper: ModelRoutingCandidateMapper' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/mapper/ModelRoutingCandidateMapper.java' '' 'Standard BaseMapper<ModelRoutingCandidateDO> following AgentConfigMapper pattern.' '' --- '' '## Phase 2: Backend Service Layer' '' '### 2.1 ModelCandidateService - CRUD + Cache' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/service/ModelCandidateService.java' '' Responsibilities: '1. CRUD operations for model routing candidates' '2. Redis cache with @Cacheable\(value = modelCandidates\) for full candidate list' '3. API key encryption/decryption using AES' '4. API key masking for frontend display \(show first 4 + last 4 chars\)' '5. On write operations, evict cache AND invalidate DynamicChatModelFactory cache' '' 'Key methods:' '- listAll\(\) - cached, returns all non-deleted candidates' '- getById\(Long id\)' '- create\(CandidateCreateRequest req\)' '- update\(Long id, CandidateUpdateRequest req\)' '- delete\(Long id\) - logical delete' '- toggleEnabled\(Long id, boolean enabled\)' '- maskApiKey\(String rawKey\) - returns sk-ab****ef format' '- getFullApiKey\(Long id\) - for copy-to-clipboard endpoint' '' 'Cache: Same pattern as AgentConfigService -- @Cacheable on read, @CacheEvict\(allEntries=true\) on writes.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '### 2.2 Refactor ModelSelector - DB-Driven Candidate Source' '' 'Current: Reads from ModelRoutingProperties.getCandidates\(\) \(YAML only\).' '' 'New design - introduce CandidateProvider interface:' '' '    interface CandidateProvider {' '        List<ModelRoutingCandidate> getCandidates\(\);' '    }' '' 'Three implementations:' '- YamlCandidateProvider: wraps existing ModelRoutingProperties \(backwards compat\)' '- DbCandidateProvider: reads from ModelCandidateService' '- CompositeCandidateProvider: merges YAML + DB; DB overrides YAML by name' '' 'ModelSelector receives CandidateProvider instead of reading properties directly.' 'During migration, CompositeCandidateProvider merges both sources.' 'If DB table is empty, behavior is identical to today.' '' Files: '- src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/CandidateProvider.java \(interface\)' '- src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/YamlCandidateProvider.java' '- src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/DbCandidateProvider.java' '- src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/CompositeCandidateProvider.java')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '### 2.3 DynamicChatModelFactory - Runtime ChatModel Creation \(CORE CHALLENGE\)' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/service/model/DynamicChatModelFactory.java' '' 'This is the trickiest part. Spring AI OpenAiChatModel is normally a singleton bean.' 'We need to create instances dynamically for arbitrary base URLs and API keys.' '' Architecture: '' '    ConcurrentHashMap<String, ChatModel> chatModelCache' '      key = candidateName' '      value = dynamically created ChatModel instance' '' '    createOrGet\(ModelRoutingCandidateDO candidate\) -> ChatModel' '      1. If candidate.beanName is non-empty: look up Spring bean \(existing path\)' '      2. If candidate has baseUrl + apiKey: create dynamic instance:' '         a. Build OpenAiApi with custom base URL and API key' '         b. Create OpenAiChatModel from that API instance' '         c. Cache in ConcurrentHashMap keyed by candidate name' '      3. Fallback to default openAiChatModel bean' '' '    invalidate\(String candidateName\)' '      Remove from cache \(called when candidate is updated/deleted\)' '' 'Implementation for Spring AI 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT:' '' '    private ChatModel createOpenAiCompatibleModel\(candidate\) {' '        OpenAiApi openAiApi = OpenAiApi.builder\(\)' '            .baseUrl\(candidate.getBaseUrl\(\)\)' '            .apiKey\(decryptApiKey\(candidate.getApiKey\(\)\)\)' '            .build\(\);' '' '        OpenAiChatOptions options = OpenAiChatOptions.builder\(\)' '            .model\(candidate.getModel\(\)\)' '            .temperature\(candidate.getTemperature\(\)\)' '            .build\(\);' '' '        return OpenAiChatModel.builder\(\)' '            .openAiApi\(openAiApi\)' '            .defaultOptions\(options\)' '            .build\(\);' '    }' '' 'This works because ALL mentioned providers \(DeepSeek, ChatGPT, ZhiPu, Gemini relay\)' 'support the OpenAI-compatible API format. The spring-ai-starter-model-openai dependency' 'already in the POM provides all required classes.' '' 'Cache invalidation trigger: When baseUrl, apiKey, model, temperature, or maxTokens' 'changes, evict that entry. Use ConcurrentHashMap.computeIfAbsent\(\) for thread safety.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '### 2.4 Refactor DynamicModelFactory.getByRoutingCandidate\(\)' '' 'File: Modify src/main/java/com/example/interview/service/DynamicModelFactory.java' '' 'Current signature: getByRoutingCandidate\(String provider, String beanName\)' 'Only resolves by bean name, ignores the model field entirely.' '' 'New: Overload to accept full candidate info:' '    getByRoutingCandidate\(ModelRoutingCandidate candidate\)' '' Flow: '    RoutingChatService.resolveChatModel\(candidate\)' '      -> DynamicModelFactory.getByRoutingCandidate\(candidate\)' '         -> If candidate has baseUrl+apiKey: DynamicChatModelFactory.createOrGet\(\)' '         -> Else if beanName non-empty: applicationContext.getBean\(beanName\)' '         -> Else: ModelBeanResolver.resolveByProvider\(provider\) -> default bean' '' '### 2.5 Extend ModelRoutingCandidate Record' '' 'File: Modify src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/ModelRoutingCandidate.java' '' 'Add optional fields for dynamic model creation:' '' '    public record ModelRoutingCandidate\(' '        String name,' '        String provider,' '        String model,' '        String beanName,' '        int priority,' '        boolean supportsThinking,' '        String baseUrl,     // new - nullable, null means use default' '        String apiKey,      // new - nullable, already decrypted' '        Double temperature  // new - nullable' '    \) {}' '' '### 2.6 API Key Encryption Utility' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/util/ApiKeyEncryptor.java' '' '- AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption' '- Key from application-private.yml property: app.security.encryption-key' '- If no key configured, store/read as plaintext \(dev mode convenience\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Phase 3: REST API Layer' '' '### 3.1 ModelCandidateController' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/controller/ModelCandidateController.java' '' '@RestController @RequestMapping\(/api/model-routing/candidates\)' '' Endpoints: '' '| Method | Path | Description |' '|--------|------|-------------|' '| GET    | /                  | List all candidates \(masked API keys\) |' '| GET    | /{id}              | Get single candidate detail |' '| POST   | /                  | Create new candidate |' '| PUT    | /{id}              | Update candidate |' '| DELETE | /{id}              | Logical delete |' '| PATCH  | /{id}/toggle       | Enable/disable toggle |' '| POST   | /{id}/probe        | Manual health probe |' '| POST   | /{id}/copy-key     | Return full API key for clipboard |' '| GET    | /health            | All candidates health status |' '' 'Response includes: masked API key, hasApiKey flag, circuit breaker state,' 'request/success/failure counts, and last failure message per candidate.' '' '### 3.2 Extend ModelRoutingController' '' 'File: Modify src/main/java/com/example/interview/controller/ModelRoutingController.java' '' 'Add endpoints:' '- POST /api/model-routing/reset-circuit/{candidateName} - Reset circuit to CLOSED' '- GET /api/model-routing/config - Return routing configuration' '- PUT /api/model-routing/config - Update default/thinking model settings' '- POST /api/model-routing/migrate-yaml-to-db - One-time YAML migration')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Phase 4: Health Monitoring' '' '### 4.1 Active Monitoring for Primary Models' '' 'File: src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/ModelHealthProber.java' '' '@Scheduled task running every 60 seconds:' '1. Query DB for candidates where is_primary=true AND enabled=true' '2. For each: send lightweight probe \(simple prompt with max_tokens=1\)' '3. Record latency, success/failure in circuit breaker' '4. Store probe results in Redis: key model:probe:{name}, TTL 5 minutes' '' 'Cost rationale: Only primary models are actively probed. Backup models' 'rely on passive detection \(circuit breaker from real failures\) plus' 'manual probe via admin UI button.' '' '### 4.2 Passive Monitoring for Backup Models' '' 'Backup models \(is_primary=false\) rely on:' '- Circuit breaker state from actual request failures \(already implemented\)' '- Manual probe via admin UI probe button' '' '### 4.3 ProbeResult DTO' '' '    public record ProbeResult\(' '        String candidateName,' '        boolean success,' '        long latencyMs,' '        String error,' '        Instant probedAt' '    \) {}' '' 'Stored in Redis with key model:probe:result:{name}, exposed via /health endpoint.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Phase 5: Frontend Implementation' '' '### 5.1 API Module' '' 'File: frontend/src/api/modelRouting.js' '' 'Functions using existing http.js wrappers:' '- listCandidates\(\) - GET /api/model-routing/candidates' '- createCandidate\(payload\) - POST' '- updateCandidate\(id, payload\) - PUT' '- deleteCandidate\(id\) - DELETE' '- toggleCandidate\(id, enabled\) - PATCH' '- probeCandidate\(id\) - POST' '- copyApiKey\(id\) - POST, returns full key' '- loadCandidateHealth\(\) - GET /health' '- resetCircuit\(name\) - POST' '- loadRoutingConfig\(\) - GET /config' '- updateRoutingConfig\(payload\) - PUT /config' '' '### 5.2 ModelProvidersView.vue' '' 'File: frontend/src/views/ModelProvidersView.vue' 'Route: /model-providers' '' 'Layout \(matching existing Tailwind patterns from MonitoringView/SettingsView\):' '' HEADER: '- Title: 模型供应商管理 / 配置和管理多模型供应商池' '- Button: + 添加模型' '' 'SUMMARY CARDS ROW \(4 cards\):' '- 总模型数, 已启用, 健康状态 \(OPTIMAL/DEGRADED\), 熔断数' '- Style: bg-white border p-4 rounded-lg border-l-4 \(same as MonitoringView\)' '' 'MODEL CARDS GRID \(2 columns on lg\):' 'Each card shows:' '- Circuit state dot \(green=CLOSED, red=OPEN, amber=HALF_OPEN\)' '- Name, provider, model, priority' '- Base URL' '- Masked API key with copy button and show/hide toggle' '- Stats: request/success/failure counts, last probe latency' '- Buttons: 探测, 编辑, 删除, primary toggle' '' 'ADD/EDIT MODAL:' '- Name, display name' '- Provider dropdown with preset auto-fill:' '    DeepSeek -> https://api.deepseek.com' '    OpenAI -> https://api.openai.com' '    ZhiPu -> https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4' '    Custom -> user enters' '- Model version input' '- Base URL, API Key \(password field\)' '- Priority number input' '- Checkboxes: supports thinking, is primary' '- Temperature slider \(same component as SettingsView\)' '' 'API KEY UX:' '- Display: type=password showing masked value \(sk-ab****ef\)' '- Eye icon toggles visibility \(only shows masked version\)' '- Copy button: calls /copy-key endpoint, uses navigator.clipboard.writeText\(\)' '- Edit form: placeholder 留空保持不变 for existing candidates' '' 'Auto-refresh every 30 seconds for health data \(MonitoringView countdown pattern\).' '' '### 5.3 Router Registration' '' 'Modify frontend/src/router/index.js:' '- Import ModelProvidersView' '- Add route: { path: model-providers, name: model-providers, component: ModelProvidersView }' '' '### 5.4 Menu Entry' '' 'Add to t_menu_config via data.sql:' '- menu_code: model-providers' '- title: 模型供应商' '- icon: hub \(Google Material Symbol\)' '- path: /model-providers' '- position: SIDEBAR' '- sort_order: 35 \(between monitoring and settings\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Phase 6: Migration Strategy \(Zero Downtime\)' '' '### Phase A: Dual-source mode \(default on first deploy\)' '- CompositeCandidateProvider merges YAML + DB candidates' '- YAML serves as baseline; DB overrides by name' '- All existing behavior unchanged' '- Admin starts adding candidates via UI' '' '### Phase B: One-time YAML-to-DB migration' '- REST endpoint: POST /api/model-routing/migrate-yaml-to-db' '- Reads YAML candidates, inserts into DB \(skip if name exists\)' '- Admin then sets candidates: [] in YAML' '' '### Phase C: Pure DB mode \(optional future\)' '- Remove YAML candidate list' '- ModelSelector reads only from DbCandidateProvider' '' 'No breaking change at any phase. If DB table is empty, system is identical to today.' '' '### Initial seed SQL:' '    INSERT INTO t_model_routing_candidate' '      \(name, display_name, provider, model, bean_name, priority, enabled, supports_thinking, is_primary\)' '    VALUES' '      \('\\''deepseek-chat'\\'', '\\''DeepSeek Chat'\\'', '\\''openai'\\'', '\\''deepseek-chat'\\'', '\\''openAiChatModel'\\'', 10, 1, 0, 1\),' '      \('\\''deepseek-reasoner'\\'', '\\''DeepSeek Reasoner'\\'', '\\''openai'\\'', '\\''deepseek-reasoner'\\'', '\\''openAiChatModel'\\'', 20, 1, 1, 0\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Phase 7: Model Name Forwarding Fix \(Critical Bug Fix\)' '' '### Current Bug' 'The model field from ModelRoutingCandidate is NEVER forwarded to ChatModel at call time.' 'Both candidates use the same openAiChatModel bean configured with model: deepseek-chat.' 'So the deepseek-reasoner candidate actually calls deepseek-chat -- this is a real bug.' '' '### Fix' 'Modify MetadataChatInvoker, StreamingChatInvoker, and FirstTokenProbeInvoker.' '' Currently: '    ChatClient.builder\(chatModel\).build\(\).prompt\(\).user\(userPrompt\).call\(\)' '' 'Fix - pass model override via ChatOptions:' '    OpenAiChatOptions overrides = OpenAiChatOptions.builder\(\)' '        .model\(candidate.model\(\)\)' '        .build\(\);' '' '    ChatClient.builder\(chatModel\).build\(\).prompt\(\)' '        .options\(overrides\)  // override model per request' '        .user\(userPrompt\)' '        .call\(\)' '' 'All three invokers need to accept ModelRoutingCandidate directly \(not just ChatModel\).' 'RoutingChatService.resolveChatModel passes candidate through to invokers.' '' 'For dynamic ChatModel instances \(new path\), the model is already baked in.' 'For shared Spring beans \(existing path\), the model MUST be overridden per request.' 'Spring AI OpenAiChatOptions supports per-request model override.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Implementation Sequence' '' '    Phase 1 \(DB Schema + Entity\)  --+' '                                     +--> Phase 2 \(Service\) --> Phase 3 \(API\)' '    Phase 7 \(Model Name Fix\)     --+                                 |' '                                                                      v' '                                                               Phase 5 \(Frontend\)' '    Phase 4 \(Health Monitoring\) ----------------------------------------+' '                                                                        |' '    Phase 6 \(Migration\) ----------------------------------------- Last -+' '' 'Recommended order:' '1. Phase 1 - DB schema, entity, mapper \(foundation\)' '2. Phase 7 - Fix model name forwarding bug \(independent, high-value\)' '3. Phase 2.3 - DynamicChatModelFactory \(core technical challenge\)' '4. Phase 2.1-2.2 - ModelCandidateService + CandidateProvider refactor' '5. Phase 2.4-2.6 - DynamicModelFactory refactor + encryption' '6. Phase 3 - REST API endpoints' '7. Phase 5 - Frontend view' '8. Phase 4 - Health monitoring' '9. Phase 6 - Migration tooling' '' --- '' '## Files Summary' '' '### New Files \(18\)' '1. src/main/java/com/example/interview/entity/ModelRoutingCandidateDO.java' '2. src/main/java/com/example/interview/mapper/ModelRoutingCandidateMapper.java' '3. src/main/java/com/example/interview/service/ModelCandidateService.java' '4. src/main/java/com/example/interview/service/model/DynamicChatModelFactory.java' '5. src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/CandidateProvider.java' '6. src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/YamlCandidateProvider.java' '7. src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/DbCandidateProvider.java' '8. src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/CompositeCandidateProvider.java' '9. src/main/java/com/example/interview/modelrouting/ModelHealthProber.java' '10. src/main/java/com/example/interview/controller/ModelCandidateController.java' '11. src/main/java/com/example/interview/util/ApiKeyEncryptor.java' '12. src/main/java/com/example/interview/dto/CandidateCreateRequest.java' '13. src/main/java/com/example/interview/dto/CandidateUpdateRequest.java' '14. src/main/java/com/example/interview/dto/CandidateResponse.java' '15. src/main/java/com/example/interview/dto/ProbeResult.java' '16. frontend/src/api/modelRouting.js' '17. frontend/src/views/ModelProvidersView.vue' '18. sql/V2__model_routing_candidates.sql' '' '### Modified Files \(11\)' '1. src/.../modelrouting/ModelRoutingCandidate.java - Add baseUrl, apiKey, temperature' '2. src/.../modelrouting/ModelSelector.java - Use CandidateProvider' '3. src/.../modelrouting/RoutingChatService.java - Pass candidate to invokers' '4. src/.../modelrouting/MetadataChatInvoker.java - Model override via ChatOptions' '5. src/.../modelrouting/StreamingChatInvoker.java - Model override' '6. src/.../modelrouting/FirstTokenProbeInvoker.java - Model override' '7. src/.../service/DynamicModelFactory.java - New overload for full candidate' '8. src/.../controller/ModelRoutingController.java - Add config/reset endpoints' '9. frontend/src/router/index.js - Add route' '10. sql/schema.sql - Add table DDL' '11. sql/data.sql - Add seed data')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' --- '' '## Risk Mitigations' '' '1. Spring AI API compatibility: Verify OpenAiApi/OpenAiChatModel builder patterns' '   against actual 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT. Fallback to constructor-based instantiation.' '' '2. Thread safety: Use ConcurrentHashMap.computeIfAbsent\(\) for atomic cache population.' '' '3. Memory: Implement invalidate\(\) on cache; consider LRU if candidate count grows.' '' '4. API key security: Mask in all DTOs, separate /copy-key endpoint, never log keys,' '   AES encryption at rest.' '' '5. Backwards compatibility: CompositeCandidateProvider ensures YAML-only mode still' '   works perfectly. RoutingChatService public API is unchanged for all 10+ consumers.' '' --- '' '## Testing Strategy' '' 'Unit tests \(extend ModelRoutingCoreTest\):' '- DbCandidateProvider returns correct candidates' '- CompositeCandidateProvider merges/overrides correctly' '- DynamicChatModelFactory cache create/invalidate' '- ApiKeyEncryptor round-trip' '- API key masking' '' 'Integration tests:' '- ModelCandidateController CRUD endpoints' '- Migration seed data verification' '- Cache eviction on updates' '' 'Manual verification:' '- Add provider via UI, verify it appears in routing' '- Disable primary, verify failover' '- Probe button triggers health check' '- Copy API key works correctly')
